evals.prompt: Audit a directory containing exact duplicate AGENTS.md files across multiple runtimes and identify the canonical source plus safe delete candidates.
evals.expected_output: Exact duplicate cluster report with canonical-source guess and delete safety buckets.

evals.prompt: Explain what actually loads together in a mixed CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md tree and show the heaviest session stacks.
evals.expected_output: Load-stack simulation with runtime-aware stack summaries and visuals.

evals.prompt: Find near-duplicate skills, distinguish them from semantic overlap, and avoid unsafe delete recommendations.
evals.expected_output: Near-duplicate pairs, confidence labels, and conservative action recommendations.
